dict.string: Win the Day uses the camera to read nutrition labels and add supplements or foods to your library.
Win the Day reads a photo of a nutrition label to add supplements or foods to your library.
Win the Day uses your location to calculate accurate prayer times and send prayer reminders.
Win the Day reads your calendar to plan your week around real commitments and adds your workouts, sessions and events.
Win the Day reads your calendar to plan your week around real commitments and adds your workouts, sessions and events.
Win the Day creates reminders for your sessions, prep and upcoming events.
Win the Day creates reminders for your sessions, prep and upcoming events.
Win the Day imports birthdays and anniversaries from your contacts so it can help you plan ahead.
